steps.title: Set up
steps.content:
Complete the square to find the circle's radius:
$$x^2 - 4x + y^2 - 8y - 80 = 0$$
$$(x-2)^2 - 4 + (y-4)^2 - 16 - 80 = 0$$
$$(x-2)^2 + (y-4)^2 = 100$$
Radius $r = \sqrt{100} = 10$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
A circle inscribed in a square touches all four sides, so the side length equals the diameter:
$$\text{side} = 2r = 20$$
$$\text{perimeter} = 4 \times 20 = 80$$
